item.title: Schneider Electric Sets a New Benchmark for AI-Driven Inspection
item.description: Schneider Electric has launched a new AI-driven inspection system to enhance quality control and automated defect detection in manufacturing facilities.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Systems Market Report, 2026-2033
item.description: Grand View Research releases a new report forecasting strong market growth for automated optical inspection systems through 2033.

item.title: ADLINK eyes doube-digit growth
item.description: ADLINK forecasts double-digit growth driven by increased demand for industrial machine vision cameras and edge computing solutions.

item.title: Waygate Technologies Krautkrämer PAXYS for Field-Ready Corrosion Inspection
item.description: Waygate Technologies introduces Krautkrämer PAXYS, a new field-ready corrosion inspection system.

item.title: Inbolt Launches Vision-Enabled Robot Programming – Closing the Loop from CAD to Factory Floor
item.description: Inbolt launches a new vision-enabled robot programming solution to turn digital twins into live robot control for factory floors.

item.title: GigaVis Wins 7.2 Billion-Won Inspection Equipment Order From Chinese Substrate Maker
item.description: GigaVis secures a significant commercial order for its automated optical inspection equipment from a Chinese substrate manufacturer, highlighting market demand.

item.title: Zinkteknik Builds Digital-First Manufacturing Strategy with Plex Platform
item.description: Automotive supplier Zinkteknik adopts the Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform to establish a scalable digital foundation for its new manufacturing operations.
